name: dispute-resolution-workbench
description: Tenant-scoped dispute operations API for finance exceptions.

tools.name: get_health
tools.description: Read the app liveness status.

tools.name: register_tenant
tools.description: Register a tenant and return the first raw API key.

tools.name: get_tenant_profile
tools.description: Read the authenticated tenant profile.

tools.name: get_tenant_profile_compat
tools.description: Read the authenticated tenant profile through the compatibility path.

tools.name: rotate_tenant_api_key
tools.description: Rotate the authenticated tenant API key.

tools.name: list_disputes
tools.description: List tenant-scoped disputes with optional queue filters.

tools.name: create_dispute
tools.description: Create a manual dispute for the authenticated tenant.

tools.name: get_dispute
tools.description: Read a dispute with attached exceptions and timeline.

tools.name: assign_dispute
tools.description: Assign a dispute to a user.

tools.name: transition_dispute
tools.description: Move a dispute through a validated status transition.

tools.name: comment_on_dispute
tools.description: Append a comment timeline row to a dispute.

tools.name: attach_exception_to_dispute
tools.description: Attach an exception to a dispute.

tools.name: list_exceptions
tools.description: List tenant-scoped manual exceptions.

tools.name: create_exception
tools.description: Create a manual exception.

tools.name: list_correlations
tools.description: List tenant-scoped correlation candidates.

tools.name: get_correlation
tools.description: Read a correlation candidate with hydrated exception and target dispute details.

tools.name: accept_correlation
tools.description: Accept a pending correlation and attach its exception to the target dispute.

tools.name: reject_correlation
tools.description: Reject a pending correlation without attaching its exception.

tools.name: list_ingestion_sources
tools.description: List tenant-scoped ingestion source settings.

tools.name: save_ingestion_source
tools.description: Save tenant-scoped ingestion source settings.

tools.name: pull_ingestion_source_now
tools.description: Run an ingestion source pull immediately.

tools.name: list_ingestion_runs
tools.description: List tenant-scoped ingestion run history.

tools.name: list_counterparties
tools.description: List tenant-scoped counterparties.

tools.name: get_counterparty
tools.description: Read a counterparty with related disputes.

tools.name: merge_counterparty
tools.description: Merge one counterparty into another.
